fix: avoid replaying channel restart recovery turns

[Bug]: Subagent completion can be announced as timed out even when the child run finished successfully
fix(cli): resolve SecretRefs in capability web search CLI path

fix: persist orphaned user leaf repair
feat(plugin-state): add atomic dedupe claims

fix(gateway): add max reconnect limit with opt-in maxReconnectAttempts
[Feature]: Improve zh-CN translation accuracy and completeness
